title: 魔法少女ファイナルピンクスター
description:
Jump Action Shooter

 6 Stages + Endless Mode

 A magical girl who's not great at flying.

 Dodge the enemy tentacles and shoot them down while staying airborne!

 Level Up & Power Up

 Defeat enemies to gain experience. Choose 1 of 3 upgrades each level up.

 Build your own strategy with different weapon combinations.

 Special Attack

 Charge your power gauge by jumping! Unleash a Special Attack to wipe out enemies.

 Epic Boss Battles

 A powerful boss awaits at the end of each stage.

Controls

 Jump / Cancel Invincibility (Ascend)

 Keyboard: Space / Mouse: Left Click / Gamepad: A Button

 Cancel Invincibility (Descend)

 Keyboard: Left Shift / Mouse: Right Click / Gamepad: B Button

 Special Attack (When Gauge is Full)

 Keyboard: Enter / Mouse: Middle Click / Gamepad: X Button
description_short: Jump Action Shooter. A magical girl who struggles with flying. Soar through the air while defeating enemies and avoiding their deadly tentacles. 6 Stages + Endless Mode
